text: Crossing the threshold into this space, I sense anticipation—the promise of discovery. The quiet precision of glass, the boldness of 'R+D' on the wall, speaks to human curiosity. Under the bright lights, knowledge and innovation swirl together. I feel a surge of inquiry, mixed with a respect for the engineering and thought that these walls celebrate. There’s something grounding and hopeful in the pursuit of understanding how we connect and co-exist with what we create.
